title: Submarine Swaps
description: Submarine swaps atomically bridge on-chain and Lightning balances using hashlock and timelock constructions. They enable non-custodial liquidity transitions across layers.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Submarine Swaps
resources.notes: Routing, liquidity, and trust-model considerations for swaps.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts Tag: Submarine swaps
resources.notes: Primary discussions of swap implementation and failure modes.

resources.title: Boltz Backend
resources.notes: Production swap implementation to study protocol flow in practice.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Detailed treatment of cross-layer payment flows, HTLC mechanics, and swap-style liquidity movement.
